title: 有馬記念の後に・福、来たれり

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the distant roar of the crowd pushing her
forward, Matikanefukukitaru dominates the
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Matikanefukukitaru who relied purely on luck
is no more. Almost fainting with elation over her
new accomplishment, she heads to the winner's
interview...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Where she tells the spectators that happiness
comes to those who seek it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She follows that with a grand announcement that
she will continue to run for her fans, promising to
bring them happiness.
